data.name: Waifus Achievement Clicker
data.detailed_description:
• 24 levels!

  • 100 quick time-based steam achievements! (2 hours for 100%)

  • 6 cool traits to upgrade!

  • Made in Godot!

  • Cheaper than a can of coffee!

Want these achievements? Come get 'em.

On your quest to 100% all sorts of cheap games on steam, you have been challenged by 8 anime-style waifus! You don't HAVE to beat them, but you MUST begin to get your achievements, so have at them and show them a good time!

data.short_description: Earn 100 easy, time-based steam achievements while clicking to love cute waifus across 24 levels! All for less than the cost of a can of coffee!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 備註: You can probably run this on anything - fully 2D and not very complex.
